end return(function(Y,H,G,d,M,l,a,p,Z,S,P,w,k,D,r,c,A,b,K,u,J)A,u,J,p,c,D,k,b,Z,r,S,w,K,P=function(Y,x)local H=Z(x)local G=function(G,d,M,l)return p(Y,{G;d;M;l},x,H)end return G end,function(Y,x)local H=Z(x)local G=function(G,d,M)return p(Y,{G,d;M},x,H)end return G end,function(Y,x)local H=Z(x)local G=function()return p(Y,{},x,H)end return G end,function(p,G,d,M)local
